preferencesDescription: Ṣakoso awọn ayanfẹ ohun elo rẹ ati awọn eto iwoye.
themeDescription: Yan laarin imọlẹ, okunkun, tabi ayanfẹ akori eto.
languageDescription: Yan ede ti o fẹran fun wiwo.
systemSettingsDescription: Tunto awọn saitan eto ati awọn ayanfẹ ti o pọju.
esmUrlDescription: URL CDN Javascript fun gbigbe awọn package.
projectTemplateDescription: URL ibi ipamọ Git lati lo bi awoṣe ibẹrẹ fun awọn iṣẹ akanṣe tuntun.
previewDomainDescription: Agbegbe ti a lo fun sandbox aṣaju wiwo iframe.
corsProxyDescription: URL proxy HTTP fun kọja awọn ihamọ CORS.
serviceWorkerNotRegistered: Ko si service worker ti o forukọsilẹ lọwọlọwọ. Service workers ni a forukọsilẹ laifọwọyi nigbati o ba gbe ohun elo.
serviceWorkerUpdatedDescription: Service worker ti ṣe imudojuiwọn ni aṣeyọri.
serviceWorkerUnregisteredDescription: Service worker ti yọ iforukọsilẹ. Ṣe isọdọtun oju-iwe lati pari ilana naa.
serviceWorkerCacheClearedDescription: Gbogbo awọn cache service worker ti nu.
faviconUrlDescription: Awoṣe URL fun gbigba awọn favicon. Awọn oniyipada to wa: {hostname}, {origin}, {href}, {protocol}, {pathname}
ngitWebUrlDescription: Awoṣe URL fun awọn ibi ipamọ Nostr Git. Awọn oniyipada to wa: {naddr}, {npub}, {pubkey}, {identifier}
showcaseEnabledDescription: Ṣafihan apakan ifihan ohun elo lori oju-iwe ile
showcaseModeratorDescription: Bọtini gbangba Nostr (npub) ti olumulo ti o le ṣakoso awọn ifisilẹ ifihan
projectsDirectoryDescription: Ọna eto faili nibiti a tọju awọn iṣẹ akanṣe
configDirectoryDescription: Ọna eto faili nibiti a tọju awọn faili iṣeto
temporaryDirectoryDescription: Ọna eto faili fun awọn faili igba diẹ
systemPromptDescription: Ṣe adani ibeere eto oluranlọwọ AI nipa lilo sintasi awoṣe ti o jọ Jinja. Eyi n ṣakoso ihuwasi ati imọ oluranlọwọ naa.
name: Orukọ
buildApps: Kọ awọn ohun elo pẹlu AI
selectModelToDescribe: Yan awoṣe ni isalẹ lati bẹrẹ...
examplePrompt: Ṣapejuwe ohun ti o fẹ kọ...
settingsDescription: Ṣakoso awọn eto ohun elo rẹ ati awọn ayanfẹ.
aiSettingsDescription: Tunto awọn olupese AI ati awọn bọtini API
gitSettingsDescription: Tunto awọn ẹri Git fun ijẹrisi HTTP
nostrSettingsDescription: Tunto awọn asopọ relay ati awọn ayanfẹ Nostr
deployButtonTooltip: Fi iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ sinu oju opo wẹẹbu kan
cloudSyncButtonTooltip: Ṣe iṣopọ iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ pẹlu Git lati ṣe aabo awọn faili
buildButtonTooltip: Kọ iṣẹ akanṣe ati ṣe imudojuiwọn awoṣe
codeButtonTooltip: Yipada si olutọju koodu lati wo ati ṣatunkọ awọn faili
logsButtonTooltip: Wo awọn ifiranṣẹ konsoli ati awọn log lati iṣẹ akanṣe
storageSettingsDescription: Gbe awọn faili jade ati ṣakoso data agbegbe
emailUpdatesDescription: Forukọsilẹ fun awọn imudojuiwọn Shakespeare ati awọn ohun elo
noProjectsYet: Ko si awọn iṣẹ akanṣe sibẹsibẹ
createFirstProject: Ṣẹda iṣẹ akanṣe akọkọ rẹ lati bẹrẹ
aiAssistantReady: Oluranlọwọ idagbasoke AI rẹ ti ṣetan lati ran ọ lọwọ lati kọ, ṣatunkọ, ati mu iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ dara si.
askMeFeatures: 💡 Beere mi lati fi awọn ẹya tuntun kun
requestEdits: 📝 Beere awọn atunkọ faili ati awọn ilọsiwaju
getHelp: 🔧 Gba iranlọwọ pẹlu atunṣe ati imudara
buildDeploy: 🚀 Kọ ati gbe iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ lọ
askToAddFeatures: Beere mi lati fi awọn ẹya kun, ṣatunkọ awọn faili, tabi kọ iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ...
selectModelFirst: Jọwọ yan awoṣe lati bẹrẹ ibaraẹnisọrọ...
buildProjectToSeePreview: Kọ iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ lati ri aṣaju wiwo nibi
selectFileFromExplorer: Yan faili lati oluṣawari lati ṣatunkọ
unsavedChanges: Awọn iyipada ti a ko fi pamọ
noFilesFound: Ko si awọn faili ti a ri
noFilesFoundSearch: Ko si awọn faili ti o baamu wiwa rẹ
repositoryStatusDescription: Wo ipo repository ati muṣọpọ pẹlu awọn repository latọna jijin
credentialsDescription: Awọn ẹri fun awọn iṣẹ titari/fa
noCredentialsWarning: Ko si awọn ẹri ti a tunto fun {{provider}}. Awọn iṣẹ titari/fa le kuna fun awọn repository ikọkọ.
commitsAhead: Commit {{count}} ni iwaju | Awọn commit {{count}} ni iwaju
commitsBehind: Commit {{count}} ni ẹhin | Awọn commit {{count}} ni ẹhin
uncommittedChanges: Iyipada {{count}} ti a ko commit | Awọn iyipada {{count}} ti a ko commit

filesWithChanges: Faili {{count}} pẹlu awọn iyipada | Awọn faili {{count}} pẹlu awọn iyipada
noUncommittedChanges: Ko si awọn iyipada ti a ko commit
notGitRepoOrBranch: Kii ṣe repository git tabi ko si ẹka lọwọlọwọ
noRemoteRepositories: Ko si awọn repository latọna jijin ti a tunto
noCommitsAhead: Ko si awọn commit ni iwaju latọna jijin. Kọkọ commit awọn iyipada rẹ.
providerExists: Olupese pẹlu orukọ yii ti wa tẹlẹ
loginToNostrRequired: Wọle si Nostr lati lo olupese yii
shakespeareDeployNostrAuth: Olupese yii nlo ijẹrisi Nostr. Rii daju pe o ti wọle lati gbe jade.
credentialsExist: Awọn ẹri fun ipilẹṣẹ yii ti wa tẹlẹ
gitIdentityDescription: Ti a ba tunto orukọ ati imeeli, wọn yoo jẹ lilo bi onkọwe. Bibẹẹkọ, shakespeare.diy yoo jẹ lilo. Nigbati a ba mu ajọpọ onkọwe ṣiṣẹ, Shakespeare yoo jẹ fifikun bi ajọpọ onkọwe.
exportFilesDescription: Gba gbogbo awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ati awọn faili rẹ gẹgẹbi apo ZIP. Eyi pẹlu gbogbo awọn faili iṣẹ akanṣe, awọn eto, ati data ti a tọju ni agbegbe.
clearAllDataDescription: Pa gbogbo data agbegbe rẹ lailai pẹlu awọn iṣẹ akanṣe, awọn eto, ati alaye cache. Iṣẹ yii ko le ṣe atunṣe.
clearDataWarning: Iṣẹ yii yoo pa gbogbo data agbegbe lati aṣawakiri yii lailai, pẹlu:
allProjects: Gbogbo awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ati awọn faili wọn
aiSettingsAndKeys: Awọn eto AI ati awọn bọtini API
gitCredentialsSettings: Awọn ẹri Git ati awọn eto
userPreferences: Awọn ayanfẹ olumulo ati awọn akori
actionCannotBeUndone: Iṣẹ yii ko le ṣe atunṣe. Ronu lati gbe awọn faili rẹ jade ni akọkọ.
filesExportedSuccessfully: Awọn faili ti gbe jade ni aṣeyọri
filesExportedDescription: Awọn faili iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ ti gba gẹgẹbi faili zip.
failedToExportFiles: O kuna lati gbe awọn faili jade
dataClearedDescription: Gbogbo data agbegbe ti yọ kuro. N ṣe atunṣe si oju-iwe ile...
persistDataDescription: Beere ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo lati yago fun isonu data nigbati ibi ipamọ aṣawakiri ba kere. Eyi ṣe iranlọwọ lati daabobo awọn iṣẹ akanṣe ati awọn eto rẹ.
persistentStorageGranted: Ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo ti funni
persistentStorageGrantedDescription: Aṣawakiri rẹ yoo daabobo data rẹ lati imukuro adaṣe.
persistentStorageAlreadyGranted: Ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo ti funni tẹlẹ
persistentStorageAlreadyGrantedDescripti: Data rẹ ti wa ni aabo lati imukuro adaṣe.
persistentStorageDenied: Ibeere ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo ti kọ
persistentStorageDeniedDescription: Aṣawakiri rẹ ti kọ ibeere naa. Data le tun jẹ imukuro adaṣe nigbati ibi ipamọ ba kere.
persistentStorageNotSupported: Ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo ko ni atilẹyin
persistentStorageNotSupportedDescription: Aṣawakiri rẹ ko ni atilẹyin awọn ibeere ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo.
failedToRequestPersistentStorage: O kuna lati beere ibi ipamọ ti o wa nigbagbogbo
mirrorsDescription: Shakespeare wa ni awọn URL digi pupọ fun aredundan ati iraye si.
changelogDescription: Wo ohun tuntun ninu ẹya kọọkan ti Shakespeare.
noModelsFound: Ko si awọn awoṣe ti a ri.
totalCostSession: Lapapọ iye owo fun igba ibaraẹnisọrọ yii
noAccountsLoggedIn: Ko si awọn akọọlẹ ti o wọle. Fi akọọlẹ kun lati bẹrẹ.
addExistingAccount: Fi Akọọlẹ Ti o Wa Tẹlẹ kun
enterHostname: Tẹ orukọ ile-ipamọ sii (fun apẹẹrẹ: git.shakespeare.diy)
cloneGitRepository: Clone repository Git si aaye iṣẹ Shakespeare rẹ
pleaseEnterValidGitUrl: Jọwọ tẹ URL repository Git to tọ tabi URI clone Nostr sinu (apeere: nostr://npub.../orukọ-repo)
nostrRepositoryImportedSuccessfully: Repository Nostr ti gbe wọle ni aṣeyọri
repositoryClonedFromNostr: "{{repoName}}" ti clone lati Nostr ati pe o ti ṣetan fun idagbasoke.
repositoryImportedSuccessfully: Repository ti gbe wọle ni aṣeyọri
repositoryClonedReady: "{{repoName}}" ti clone ati pe o ti ṣetan fun idagbasoke.
failedToImportRepository: O kuna lati gbe repository wọle
repositoryNotFoundOnNostr: Repository ko ri lori nẹtiwọọki Nostr. Jọwọ ṣayẹwo URI ati gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
noCloneUrlsFound: Ikede repository ri ṣugbọn ko si awọn URL clone to wa.
allCloneAttemptsFailed: Repository ri ṣugbọn gbogbo awọn URL clone kuna. Repository le ma wa.
repositoryNotFound: Repository ko ri. Jọwọ ṣayẹwo URL ati gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
accessDenied: Wiwọle ni idinamọ. Repository le jẹ ikọkọ tabi nilo ijẹrisi.
networkError: Aṣiṣe nẹtiwọọki. Jọwọ ṣayẹwo asopọ rẹ ati gbiyanju lẹẹkansi.
featuredApps: Awọn Ohun elo Ti a Yan
featuredAppsDescription: Awọn ohun elo ti a yan n ṣafihan ti o dara julọ ti agbegbe wa
templatesDescription: Awọn awoṣe ti o ṣetan lati lo lati bẹrẹ iṣẹ akanṣe rẹ
clickToViewMore: Tẹ lati wo awọn ohun elo agbegbe diẹ sii
noAppsFound: Ko si awọn ohun elo ti a ri. Gbiyanju relay miiran?
aiPoweredDevelopmentAssistant: Oluranlọwọ idagbasoke AI rẹ fun kikọ awọn ohun elo aṣa. O kan ṣapejuwe ohun ti o fẹ kọ, AI yoo ran ọ lọwọ lati ṣẹda rẹ.
shakespeareOpenSource: Shakespeare jẹ sọfitiwia Orisun Ṣiṣi ti o nṣiṣẹ patapata ninu aṣawakiri wẹẹbu rẹ
yourDeviceConnects: Ẹrọ rẹ nso taara si awọn olupese AI ẹlẹgbẹta ti o yan
filesStoredOnDevice: Awọn faili rẹ ni a tọju lori ẹrọ rẹ ninu aṣawakiri
carefulBrowserData: Ṣọra lati ma pa data aṣawakiri rẹ rẹ tabi o le padanu awọn faili iṣẹ akanṣe
responsibleBackups: O ni ojuṣe fun gbigbe awọn afẹyinti tabi muṣọpọ si git
qualityDependsOnInput: Didara abajade da lori didara titẹ sii ati awọn awoṣe ti a lo, ko si idaniloju
shakespeareNotCloudService: Shakespeare kii ṣe iṣẹ awọsanma. O jẹ sọfitiwia Orisun Ṣiṣi ti o nṣiṣẹ lori ẹrọ rẹ. O gba Awọn Ofin Iṣẹ ti awọn olupese AI ti o nba ṣiṣẹ pọ. A pese Shakespeare "bi o ti wa" laisi idaniloju eyikeyi.
selectAIProviderDescription: Yan olupese AI lati mu oluranlọwọ idagbasoke rẹ ṣiṣẹ. O le fi awọn olupese diẹ sii kun nigbamii ninu awọn eto.
noModelsAvailable: Ko si awọn awoṣe to wa. Jọwọ ṣayẹwo asopọ rẹ ki o tun gbiyanju.
noModelsMatchingSearch: Ko si awọn awoṣe ti o baamu wiwa rẹ.
nowYoureReady: Bayi o ti ṣetan lati kọ!
aiAssistantConfigured: Oluranlọwọ AI rẹ ti ṣeto ati pe o ṣetan lati ran ọ lọwọ. O kan tẹ itọsọna rẹ sii lati bẹrẹ kikọ awọn ohun elo Nostr ti o yanilenu.
paymentHistoryAppears: Itan isanwo rẹ yoo han nibi

createGiftCardsToShare: Ṣẹda awọn kaadi ẹbun lati pin pẹlu awọn miiran
stripeCheckoutOpened: Ṣayẹwo Stripe ti ṣii ni window tuntun.
lightningPaymentSent: Isanwo Lightning rẹ ti firanṣẹ ni aṣeyọri.
failedToSendLightning: O kuna lati firanṣẹ isanwo Lightning
successfullyCreatedGiftCards: O ṣẹda kaadi ẹbun {{count}} ni aṣeyọri | O ṣẹda awọn kaadi ẹbun {{count}} ni aṣeyọri.
failedToCreateGiftCards: O kuna lati ṣẹda awọn kaadi ẹbun
creditsAddedToAccount: A ti fi {{amount}} kun si akọọlẹ rẹ.
failedToRedeemGiftCard: O kuna lati ra kaadi ẹbun

enterGiftCardCodePrompt: Jọwọ tẹ koodu kaadi ẹbun sinu.
paymentExpiredMessage: Isanwo ti pari. Jọwọ ṣẹda isanwo tuntun.
failedToCheckPaymentStatus: O kuna lati ṣayẹwo ipo isanwo
noActiveGiftCards: Ko si awọn kaadi ẹbun ti nṣiṣẹ
noActiveGiftCardsToPrint: O ko ni awọn kaadi ẹbun ti nṣiṣẹ lati tẹjade.
failedToOpenPrintWindow: O kuna lati ṣi window titẹjade. Jọwọ gba laaye awọn popup fun aaye yii.
failedToGenerateQRCodes: O kuna lati ṣẹda awọn koodu QR fun titẹjade
noActiveGiftCardsToDownload: O ko ni awọn kaadi ẹbun ti nṣiṣẹ lati gba.
downloadedGiftCards: Gba kaadi ẹbun {{count}} | Gba awọn kaadi ẹbun {{count}}.
failedToGenerateCSV: O kuna lati ṣẹda faili CSV
readyToAddCredits: Ṣetan lati fi awọn kirẹditi wọnyi kun si akọọlẹ rẹ?
addProviderToRedeem: Fi {{providerName}} kun lati ra awọn kirẹditi rẹ
giftCardNotFound: A ko le ri kaadi ẹbun yii.
giftCardAlreadyRedeemed: A ti ra kaadi ẹbun yii tẹlẹ.
deleteLabelConfirmation: Ṣé o dá a lójú pé o fẹ́ pa àmì "{{name}}" rẹ́? Èyí yóò yọ àmì náà kúrò nínú gbogbo iṣẹ́.
createLabelToOrganize: Ṣẹ̀dá àmì láti ṣètò àwọn iṣẹ́ rẹ
noLabelsCreated: A kò tí ì ṣẹ̀dá àmì kankan
discoverPluginsDescription: Ṣayẹwo ati fi sori ẹrọ awọn plugins Shakespeare ti a pin lori nẹtiwọọki Nostr.
noPluginsFound: Ko si awọn plugins ti o baamu wiwa rẹ.
noPluginsAvailable: Ko si awọn plugins ti o wa ni akoko yii.
pluginInstalledDescription: A ti fi plugin "{{name}}" sori ẹrọ ni aṣeyọri.
pluginInstallFailed: O Kuna Lati Fi Plugin Sori Ẹrọ
noCloneUrlDescription: Plugin yii ko ni clone URL ti a ṣeto.
loginToDiscoverPlugins: Wọle pẹlu Nostr lati ṣawari awọn plugins lati ọdọ awọn eniyan ti o ntẹle.
noPluginsFromNetworkDescription: Ko ri awọn plugins lati ọdọ awọn eniyan ti o ntẹle. Tẹle awọn olupilẹṣẹ plugin lori Nostr lati rii awọn plugins wọn nibi.
projectDuplicatedDescription: Iṣẹ akanṣe ti ṣe ẹda ni aṣeyọri.
failedToDuplicateProject: O kuna lati ṣe ẹda iṣẹ akanṣe
duplicateProjectDescription: Ṣẹda ẹda ti iṣẹ akanṣe yii pẹlu orukọ tuntun
